compiled_state.title: Fix: REVIEW-PROTOCOL-WORKFLOW.md Quick Reference omits critical+major escalation case
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 0 (BASIC). Quick Reference line says 'Escalate critical+critical' but Stage 3 body says 'both critical or major → escalate'. Missing critical+major and major+major cases.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
